description_long: This oven features a rectangular, boxy form with a dark, metallic exterior that has a slightly mottled, reflective finish. The front face is dominated by three horizontal slots or vents, with the middle slot appearing slightly deformed or bent, suggesting wear or damage. The sides are plain and unadorned, with the same dark, metallic texture extending seamlessly around the object. The top surface is flat and also exhibits the same reflective, slightly rough finish. There are no visible handles, buttons, or control panels on any side, giving the oven a minimalist and industrial appearance. The overall design suggests durability and functionality, suitable for urban or utility settings.
description: A dark, metallic oven with a boxy shape and three horizontal front slots, featuring a worn, reflective finish and a minimalist, industrial design.
description_view_0: The front view shows three horizontal slots, with the middle one slightly bent, and a reflective, mottled metallic surface.
description_view_1: The left side view is plain, showing a flat, featureless metallic surface with a slightly reflective finish.
description_view_2: The back view displays three horizontal recesses similar to the front, with a consistent metallic texture and no visible controls.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, with a plain, flat metallic surface and no distinguishing features.
attribute_control_panel_design: No visible control panel or controls are present on any side of the oven. The front and sides are featureless except for the horizontal slots.
attribute_door_handle_type: No visible door handle is present; the front face is flat with only horizontal slots, suggesting an integrated or hidden handle design.
attribute_ventilation_features: Three horizontal slots or vents are present on the front and back faces, likely serving as ventilation features.
